author_rating_explanation: Both first author Han Chi and last author Jianqiang Huang are affiliated with the Computer Network Information Center and Hangzhou Institute for Advanced Study, Chinese Academy of Sciences. CAS is a top-tier Chinese research institution in the 6-8 score band.
